## Arista Networks Named in AI Infrastructure Thematic Basket Alongside Founder-Led Peers

Consistent inclusion of ANET in AI infrastructure thematic baskets reflects growing buy-side consensus around the networking buildout thesis — reinforces conviction rather than adding new information.

- ANET highlighted as a core AI infrastructure pick in a thematic grouping with two unspecified founder-led names
- Coverage reinforces the network-buildout thesis for AI capex beneficiaries
- No financial data, price target, or specific co-picks named in the headline
- Medium classifier confidence given the thematic relevance even without a hard catalyst
